mapper.sql: id, title, page_type, category, software, version, canonical_title, alias_titles, summary, source_refs, status, contradiction_note, compiled_by, compiled_at, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wiki_pages WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM wiki_pages WHERE title = #{title} AND page_type = #{pageType}
SELECT * FROM wiki_pages ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, title FROM wiki_pages
SELECT * FROM wiki_pages WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY title
SELECT * FROM wiki_pages WHERE software = #{software} ORDER BY title
SELECT * FROM wiki_pages WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT *, MATCH(title, summary, content) AGAINST(#{query} IN BOOLEAN MODE) AS relevance FROM wiki_pages WHERE MATCH(title, summary, content) AGAINST(#{query} IN BOOLEAN MODE) AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY relevance DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM wiki_pages WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wiki_pages WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wiki_pages
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_pages (title, page_type, category, software, version, canonical_title, alias_titles, content, summary, source_refs, status, compiled_by, compiled_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{pageType}, #{category}, #{software}, #{version}, #{canonicalTitle}, #{aliasTitles}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{sourceRefs}, #{status}, #{compiledBy}, #{compiledAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE wiki_pages SET title=#{title}, page_type=#{pageType}, category=#{category}, software=#{software}, version=#{version}, canonical_title=#{canonicalTitle}, alias_titles=#{aliasTitles}, content=#{content}, summary=#{summary}, source_refs=#{sourceRefs}, status=#{status}, contradiction_note=#{contradictionNote}, compiled_by=#{compiledBy}, compiled_at=#{compiledAt}, reviewed_by=#{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at=#{reviewedAt}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wiki_pages WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND page_type != 'OVERVIEW' AND id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT to_page_id FROM wiki_links)
SELECT * FROM wiki_pages WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND updated_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT * FROM wiki_pages WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT FROM wiki_pages ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT FROM wiki_pages WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY title
SELECT FROM wiki_pages WHERE software = #{software} ORDER BY title
SELECT FROM wiki_pages WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
